name: SwipeCircle
description: Warm coral-rose consumer social theme with peach undertones and violet match-accent. Pill-shaped everything, soft drop shadows replacing harsh borders, photo-first card surfaces with bottom gradient overlays. Bouncy spring micro-interactions reward every tap. Hinge meets BeReal meets a Dribbble shot — premium consumer dating-app vibe.
personality: warm + playful + photo-centric + bouncy + intimate + rewarding

decorators.swipecircle-card: Photo-first card with full-bleed image, bottom gradient overlay (transparent to dark), 24px border-radius, soft coral-tinted lift shadow. Used for swipe deck and content cards.
decorators.swipecircle-pill: Pill-shaped CTA with coral fill, white text, scale-on-hover (1.04) and press-down (0.96). Bouncy spring transition. Tactile and inviting.
decorators.swipecircle-tab-active: Active bottom-tab state with violet underline dot beneath the icon, icon scale 1.1, color shift from muted to primary. Spring transition on tap.
decorators.swipecircle-match-burst: Radial coral-to-violet burst gradient used in match celebration overlay. Animated scale-in from 0 with spring bounce, slow rotate (10deg over 4s).
decorators.swipecircle-photo-frame: Circular avatar with double-ring border (3px coral outer, 2px cream inner gap), soft shadow. Used for profile and match avatars.
decorators.swipecircle-chip-selected: Interest chip in selected state with coral fill, white text, embedded check icon, slight scale bounce on toggle. Companion: unselected uses border-only.
decorators.swipecircle-action-button: Circular icon button (56-64px) for swipe actions. Floating drop shadow, hover lift, tap-bounce. Heart=coral, X=muted-gray, Star=violet.
decorators.swipecircle-floating-bar: Glassy floating bar with backdrop-blur and soft border-top. Used for the action bar above the bottom-tab navigator. No harsh edges.
decorators.swipecircle-bubble: Rounded chat bubble with soft drop shadow. Mine: coral-fill+white-text, right-aligned tail. Theirs: cream-fill+dark-text, left-aligned tail.
decorators.swipecircle-grid-tile: Circular avatar tile inside a soft-shadow square card. Hover lift+ring-glow. New-match dot in violet at top-right.

swipe-feed.description: Photo-first swipe deck centered in the viewport with floating action bar above bottom tabs. Coral and violet accents punctuate the warm peach surface.

matches.description: Grid of circular avatar tiles with new-match dots, presence rail at top. Soft tile lift on hover with coral glow.

chat.description: Intimate one-to-one chat with rounded bubbles and warm timestamps. Coral mine, cream theirs.

profile.description: Mobile profile with full-bleed cover photo, overlapping circular avatar, stats bar, interest pills, and pill-shaped action buttons.

auth.description: Single centered card on warm peach background. Coral primary CTA, violet hover state. Bouncy entrance.

marketing.description: Splash with photo-first hero, gradient orbs, pill CTAs, and warm peach scroll surface. Friendly, not corporate.

swipecircle-card.description: Photo-first card with full-bleed image, bottom gradient overlay, 24px border-radius, soft coral-tinted lift shadow. The signature surface for the swipe deck.
swipecircle-card.intent: Use for swipe-deck cards and any content card that leads with imagery. The bottom gradient ensures text overlay remains readable against any photo. The coral-tinted shadow signals warmth without harshness — replaces neutral grey shadows that read as enterprise.

swipecircle-pill.description: Pill-shaped CTA with coral fill, white text, scale-on-hover. Tactile spring transitions. The signature button shape.
swipecircle-pill.intent: Use for ALL primary CTAs. The pill shape signals approachability over enterprise sharpness. The spring scale on press provides satisfying haptic-like feedback.

swipecircle-tab-active.description: Active bottom-tab state with violet underline dot, scaled icon, and color-shifted label. Spring transition on tap.
swipecircle-tab-active.intent: Use ONLY on the active tab in the bottom-tab-bar. The violet dot is the primary visual signal of selected state — bright enough to read at a glance, subtle enough not to scream. The icon scale provides a secondary cue.

swipecircle-match-burst.description: Radial coral-to-violet burst gradient. Animated scale-in from 0 with spring bounce. The celebratory visual moment when two users match.
swipecircle-match-burst.intent: Use exclusively in the match-celebration overlay. The burst signals reward and joy. The slow rotate adds magic without distracting from the central avatars meeting.

suggested_properties.animation: swipecircle-burst-in 600ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) forwards, swipecircle-burst-rotate 4s linear infinite

swipecircle-photo-frame.description: Circular avatar with double-ring border. Coral outer ring, cream inner gap, soft shadow. Photo-first identity surface.
swipecircle-photo-frame.intent: Use for ALL avatar imagery (profile, matches, chat). The double-ring frame elevates the photo into a proper portrait — signals care for identity. Cream inner gap provides clean separation from any background.

swipecircle-chip-selected.description: Selected interest chip with coral fill, white text, embedded check icon, scale bounce on toggle. Companion: unselected chip uses border-only.
swipecircle-chip-selected.intent: Use in chip-multiselect (interest picker) for the selected state. The fill provides immediate clarity of selection. The check icon doubles down on accessibility for color-blind users.

swipecircle-action-button.description: Circular icon button (56-64px) for swipe actions (X, heart, star). Floating drop shadow, hover lift, tap-bounce. Heart=coral, X=muted-gray, Star=violet.
swipecircle-action-button.intent: Use exclusively for the swipe-action-bar buttons. The size is intentionally generous (56-64px) for thumb-friendly mobile tapping. The color coding matches semantic meaning — heart for like (coral=love), X for pass (muted=neutral-no), star for super-like (violet=premium).

swipecircle-floating-bar.description: Glassy floating bar with backdrop-blur and soft border-top. The container for the bottom-tab navigator and action bar overlays.
swipecircle-floating-bar.intent: Use for the bottom-tab-bar shell region. The backdrop-blur lets content behind subtly bleed through, signaling that content continues underneath rather than being chopped. Soft border-top is the only visual separator — no harsh hairline.
usage: Sticky action footer in mobile flows

swipecircle-bubble.description: Rounded chat bubble with soft drop shadow. Mine: coral-fill+white-text, right-aligned tail. Theirs: cream-fill+dark-text, left-aligned tail.
swipecircle-bubble.intent: Use for chat-message rendering. The fill colors instantly communicate ownership — coral for self, cream for partner. The directional tail (small triangle peeking from the bubble corner) reinforces conversational direction.

swipecircle-grid-tile.description: Circular avatar tile inside a soft-shadow square card. Hover lift+ring-glow. New-match dot in violet at top-right.
swipecircle-grid-tile.intent: Use for the matches-grid tiles. The square card with circular avatar inside creates a tidy grid rhythm while preserving the photo-portrait feel. The new-match violet dot is the primary signal of unseen matches.
